name: cloud-task
description: 第三方 API 接入中台

scripts.push: git add . ; git commit -m "1" ; git push
scripts.kill:3000: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }"
scripts.build:exe: bun run scripts/build-web.ts && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/app.js --target bun && bun build --compile ./dist/app.js --outfile ./dist/cloud-task.exe
scripts.build:exe:docs: echo '先将静态资源读取到一个js中，配置到 接口中（实现打包后访问页面），  然后打包js， 然后通过js生成exe文件，最后将exe和静态资源放在一起' && bun run scripts/build-assets.ts && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/app.js --target bun && bun build --compile ./dist/app.js --outfile ./dist/cloud-task.exe && copy .\static .\dist\static /E /I
